/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/backy_x_cli.dir/backy_x_cli_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backy_x_cli.dir/src/cli/main_cli.cpp.o -o backy_x_cli -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libLocalTarget_lib.a libbacky_x_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
